data.body: Bot-psychologist diagnosis: Sycophancy (#9). Root cause: reviewer-findings.json has no reviewer_tier field, record-review.sh cannot detect tier downgrade. Three fixes needed: (1) text directive in REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md [applying now], (2) reviewer_tier schema field [needs epic], (3) artifact gate in record-review.sh [needs epic]. Fixes 2+3 escalated to user for brainstorming.
